chapter_title.en: The Obligation of the jumu’ah Prayer, Its Virtue, Who is Exempt From it, and the Prayer and Sermon Therein

text: اَلْحَوَائِجِ يَوْمَ اَلْجُمُعَةِ بُكْرَةً مِنْ أَجْلِ اَلصَّلاَةِ فَأَمَّا بَعْدَ اَلصَّلاَةِ فَجَائِزٌ يُتَبَرَّكُ بِهِ » وَرَدَ ذَلِكَ فِي جَوَابِ اَلسَّرِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي اَلْحَسَنِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1252 - It is disliked to travel and seek to fulfil needs on the morning of Jumu’ah due to the (obligation of) the Jumu’ah prayer. However, after the prayer, it is permissible and brings blessings."
This was mentioned in response to a question by al-Sari from Imam Abu al-Hasan Ali ibn Muhammad (as).
